config.simplesorter.title: SimpleSorter Settings
config.simplesorter.requireZ: Require holding Z to open settings
config.simplesorter.requireZ.tooltip: When enabled, you must hold Z while pressing the settings key to open this menu.
config.simplesorter.tabOrder.tooltip: Categories listed first have higher sorting priority. You can add custom Item Group IDs.
config.simplesorter.categoryOrder.toolti: Categories listed first have higher sorting priority. You can add custom Item Group IDs.
config.simplesorter.replaceSameItem: Replace broken tool with same item
config.simplesorter.replaceSameItem.tool: When your held tool breaks, auto-replace it with the same item from inventory.
config.simplesorter.replaceSameType: Replace broken tool with same type
config.simplesorter.replaceSameType.tool: If no exact match is found, replace it with the same tool type, for example iron pickaxe -> diamond pickaxe.
config.simplesorter.autoRefill.tooltip: When your held stackable item count drops below the threshold, auto-refill it from inventory.
config.simplesorter.refillThreshold.tool: Refill when 64-stack items drop below this count. 16-stack items automatically use half of the threshold.
